verified: real Chromium screen, document, diff, stale-finding, annotation, and ask flows
clean wheel install, daemon startup, packaged assets, MCP pages, findings, and replies
wheel installation of STT, PTT, wake, floor, and MCP optional profiles on Python 3.11
